name: chatgpt-sidecar
description: Bring the active Codex conversation and repository into ChatGPT Quick Chat without starting another Codex model turn.

interface.shortDescription: Use active Codex context in ChatGPT Quick Chat
interface.longDescription: Sidecar starts a local read-only MCP bridge that lets ChatGPT Quick Chat retrieve the active saved Codex conversation, repository state, diffs, and important project files without submitting another prompt to the Codex thread.
defaultPrompt: Use Sidecar to plan the next step from my active Codex chat.
Use Sidecar to debug the issue in my current Codex project.
Use Sidecar to review my current Codex thread and Git diff.
